title: Develop message-based solutions
summary: Learn how to build applications with message-based architectures by integrating Azure Service Bus and Azure Queue Storage in to your solution.

sections.title: Develop message-based solutions
sections.summary: Learn how to build applications with message-based architectures by integrating Azure Service Bus and Azure Queue Storage in to your solution.

lessons.title: Discover Azure message queues
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to integrate Azure Service Bus and Azure Queue storage in to your solution, and how to send and receive message by using .NET.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/discover-azure-message-queue/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop message-based solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop message-based solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
